## Meeting Purpose

[Four week check-in and feedback session for Athena, Marcel's virtual assistant.](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need for more proactive approach from Athena in prioritizing tasks and following up](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Importance of regular feedback sessions to align expectations and improve performance](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Emphasis on increasing productivity and systematizing processes as business grows](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

## Topics

### Scheduling and Feedback Cadence

  - [Agreed to have weekly 15-20 min sync meetings for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Polycarp to join bi-weekly for progress review](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Marcel to provide more qualitative feedback beyond just "thumbs up"](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Prioritization and Proactivity

  - [Athena needs to better prioritize urgent/high-impact tasks (e.g. webinar follow-ups)](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Should proactively identify areas where she can take over repetitive tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Ask for clarification when unsure about priorities instead of waiting](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Productivity and Systematization

  - [Need to increase overall productivity as business grows](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Athena should be more forceful in scheduling tasks/meetings](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Use tools like shared calendars, screen sharing to increase efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Create training videos (loom) for technical processes](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule weekly 15-20 min sync meeting on calendar](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Athena to be more proactive in prioritizing tasks and managing Marcel's time](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Continued training on tools like Notion, Atio CRM](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Bi-weekly progress review with Polycarp](https://fathom.video/share/xScnY8Xd2s5wxb-7_dmWRFj646FUuwXK?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
